objective: Trace the real runtime path, make the smallest coherent change, and return reviewable evidence.
explorationHints: Read the applicable project rules and inspect existing callers before editing.
Prefer reuse when it remains coherent, but do not treat these hints as a file whitelist or fixed implementation path.
validationHints: Choose validation that matches the changed surface: headless for logic, GUI/MCP/interactive evidence for UI.
Explain why the selected evidence is relevant and preserve contradictory evidence for controller review.
safetyGuardrails: Do not make unresolved product or safety decisions.
Do not publish, push, message external systems, or change production without explicit authority.
